heroSection.heading: African Center of Excellence in Bioinformatics and Data-Intensive Sciences
heroSection.subheading: Advancing computational research and data science across Africa

missionSection.mission: To be a sustainable center of excellence that leverages High Performance Computing, Bioinformatics, Data science and Enhanced Visualization capabilities to support Research and Training that enhances health in Africa.
missionSection.vision: To be a leading center of excellence in computational sciences, driving transformative research and producing world-class graduates who contribute to sustainable development in Africa and beyond.

focusAreasSection.sectionDescription: Our research and training programs span multiple disciplines, leveraging computational methods to solve real-world problems.

focusAreas.title: Bioinformatics & Genomics
focusAreas.description: Advancing understanding of biological systems through computational analysis of genomic and molecular data, with applications in disease research and precision medicine.

focusAreas.title: Data Science & Analytics
focusAreas.description: Developing innovative data-driven solutions for complex problems in public health, agriculture, climate science, and beyond using machine learning and statistical methods.

focusAreas.title: High-Performance Computing
focusAreas.description: Providing state-of-the-art computational infrastructure and expertise to enable large-scale scientific computing and data-intensive research across Africa.

focusAreas.title: Capacity Building
focusAreas.description: Training the next generation of computational scientists through graduate programs, workshops, and collaborative research opportunities.

partnershipSection.description: We collaborate with leading institutions worldwide to advance computational research and training in Africa.

partners.name: University of Cambridge
partners.description: Collaborative research in bioinformatics and genomics

partners.name: Uppsala University
partners.description: Partnership in computational biology and training

partners.name: Makerere University
partners.description: Host institution and primary academic partner

partners.name: African Research Universities Alliance
partners.description: Network for research excellence across Africa

partners.name: World Bank
partners.description: Support for infrastructure and capacity building
